query:
SELECT DISTINCT mesAno, COUNT(*) as qtd 
FROM contasCorrentes 
GROUP BY mesAno
ORDER BY mesAno;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user axRHbWZqKReZrAb.b2cf85c9ad94 --database SMgJn6AGQCNfDq7mPzPqc9 --execute SELECT DISTINCT mesAno, COUNT(*) as qtd 
FROM contasCorrentes 
GROUP BY mesAno
